summary.title: Online Payments Processing Platform
summary.description:
This threat model has been provided by the OWASP Threat Model Cookbook:
threat-model-cookbook/Flow Diagram/payment

text.text:
Demo threat model for an online Payments Processing Platform
provided by the OWASP Threat Model Cookbook:
threat-model-cookbook/Flow Diagram/payment

data.name:
Demo threat model for an online Payments Processing Platform
provided by the OWASP Threat Model Cookbook:
threat-model-cookbook/Flow Diagram/payment

(1) Customer logs into
the merchant site

threats.title: Spoofing
threats.description:
stolen session token
credential stuffing
Attacker uses another user’s session to pay for or access their order.
threats.mitigation:
Strong authentication
Secure session management
HTTPOnly / Secure cookies
Token validation and expiration

threats.title: Tampering
threats.description:
manipulating request parameters
changing hidden fields in forms

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.description:
session token leakage
sensitive data exposed in responses
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.description:
login brute force
repeated page refresh
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

data.name:
(3) Customer Client sends order intent
including order amount
(6) Return PaymentIntent to
the Customer Client

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.description:
modify amount, currency ->underpay for goods
change order_id -> access another user's order
threats.mitigation:
Calculate amount server-side
validate currency against order record
check order ownership before processing

threats.title: Elevation of Privilege
threats.description: access another user's order via modified order_id
threats.mitigation:
Enforce authorization checks
Bind order_id to authenticated user

threats.title: Elevation of Privilege
threats.description: access another user's order via modified order_id
threats.mitigation: Provide remediation for this threat or a reason if status is N/A

threats.title: Repudiation
threats.mitigation:
audit logs with timestamp
store userID with transaction

labelText.text:
(3) Customer Client sends order intent
including order amount
(6) Return PaymentIntent to
the Customer Client

threats.title: Spoofing
threats.description: Fake webhook marking order as paid
threats.mitigation:
Verify Stripe webhook signature

Reject unsigned or invalid events

threats.title: Replay
threats.mitigation:
Store processed event IDs
Implement idempotent handling

threats.title: Tampering
threats.mitigation:
Verify event type
Optionally re-query Stripe API for confirmation

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.mitigation:
Rate limiting

Authentication before heavy processing

Asynchronous processing queue

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.description:
Exposing unnecessary metadata
Leaking internal order identifiers
threats.mitigation:
Return only client_secret
Avoid including sensitive backend data
Do not log client_secret

data.name:
(4) Merchant sends order information
inc amount and currency

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.description:
Provide a description for this threat
Secret API key leakage (accidentally put it in frontend or env.)
threats.mitigation:
Store keys in secure secret manager
Never expose keys to frontend
Restrict key permissions

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.description:
(Logic Flaw)
Incorrect amount sent due to logic bug
threats.mitigation:
Recalculate order total from database
Validate business logic before Stripe call

threats.title: New STRIDE threat
threats.mitigation:
Rate limit order creation
Validate order state before creating PaymentIntent

labelText.text:
(4) Merchant sends order information
inc amount and currency
